name: Cyberpsycho Pocket Dimension ( Lex Luthor)
description: Murkmans biggest Rival, Jim B ( The Joker ) has been tying to put an end to Murk and his whole shtick since the Dawn of Night City. It seems Jim partnered with Lex Luthor giving him a Pocket Dimension, Cutting a tear through reality and Destabilizing the surrounding area! Seize his Lair and harness the Power of Under The Map Multiversal Traversal !
